# Core Data Structures (compat shim)


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

``` python
# Shim verification: the re-export is class-identical AND the wire registration
# travels with it (consumers importing from here return DTOs that cross the
# worker boundary typed).
import json as _json
import cjm_capability_primitives.transcription as _new
from cjm_substrate.core.wire import wire_encode, wire_decode, WIRE_KIND_KEY

assert TranscriptionResult is _new.TranscriptionResult
res = TranscriptionResult(text="shim round-trip")
env = wire_encode(res)
assert env[WIRE_KIND_KEY] == "transcription.result"
back = wire_decode(_json.loads(_json.dumps(env)))
assert isinstance(back, TranscriptionResult) and back == res
print("transcription-adapter-interface core shim OK")
```
